category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Australian GEMS, energy labelling, electrical safety, refrigerant, and registration requirements.

title.en: China-to-Australia Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入澳大利亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入澳洲：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Australian GEMS MEPS, Energy Rating Label, GEMS registration, RCM electrical safety, EESS registration, Ozone/SGG refrigerant controls, and R600a flammability requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与澳大利亚GEMS最低能效、能效标签、GEMS注册、RCM电气安全、EESS注册、臭氧/合成温室气体制冷剂管制及R600a可燃性要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與澳洲GEMS最低能效、能效標籤、GEMS登記、RCM電氣安全、EESS登記、臭氧/合成溫室氣體製冷劑管制及R600a可燃性要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, regulator assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and retailers should verify current Australian GEMS legislation, EESS participation rules, RCM marking rules, refrigerant import controls, and applicable AS/NZS standards with qualified professionals before shipment or supply.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、监管机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和零售商在出货或供应前，应与合格专业人士核验现行澳大利亚GEMS法规、EESS参与规则、RCM标志规则、制冷剂进口管制及适用AS/NZS标准。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、監管機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和零售商在出貨或供應前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行澳洲GEMS法規、EESS參與規則、RCM標誌規則、製冷劑進口管制及適用AS/NZS標準。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face five major Australia compliance gaps: (1) GEMS MEPS and Energy Rating Label obligations under the Greenhouse and Energy Minimum Standards Act 2012 and the Household Refrigerating Appliances Determination 2019, using AS/NZS 4474:2018 and AS/NZS IEC 62552 test methods; (2) GEMS registration before supply in Australia; (3) electrical safety compliance, RCM marking, and EESS responsible supplier/equipment registration where applicable, with AS/NZS 60335.2.24 used as the refrigerator safety standard route; (4) refrigerant import controls under the Ozone Protection and Synthetic Greenhouse Gas Management Act 1989 for HFC-charged appliances; and (5) R600a flammability documentation, charge limits, markings, and safety assessment. Chinese CCC, China Energy Label, and GB reports do not by themselves satisfy Australian supply obligations.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商进入澳大利亚面临五大合规差距：（1）依据《温室气体与能源最低标准法2012》及《家用制冷器具决定2019》的GEMS最低能效与能效标签义务，并使用AS/NZS 4474:2018和AS/NZS IEC 62552试验方法；（2）供应澳大利亚前完成GEMS注册；（3）电气安全、RCM标志及适用时的EESS责任供应商/设备注册，AS/NZS 60335.2.24作为电冰箱安全标准路径；（4）含HFC制冷剂器具依据《臭氧保护和合成温室气体管理法1989》的进口管制；（5）R600a可燃性文件、充注量限制、标识和安全评估。中国CCC、中国能效标识和GB报告本身不能满足澳大利亚供应义务。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商進入澳洲面臨五大合規差距：（1）依據《溫室氣體與能源最低標準法2012》及《家用製冷器具決定2019》的GEMS最低能效與能效標籤義務，並使用AS/NZS 4474:2018和AS/NZS IEC 62552試驗方法；（2）供應澳洲前完成GEMS登記；（3）電氣安全、RCM標誌及適用時的EESS責任供應商/設備登記，AS/NZS 60335.2.24作為電冰箱安全標準路徑；（4）含HFC製冷劑器具依據《臭氧保護和合成溫室氣體管理法1989》的進口管制；（5）R600a可燃性文件、充注量限制、標識和安全評估。中國CCC、中國能效標識和GB報告本身不能滿足澳洲供應義務。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, Australian Government, EESS, Energy Rating, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs not accepted. legislation.gov.au is the canonical source for Commonwealth legislation.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true.
